overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment. The character moves past street vending machines, navigates around a residential building, crosses a busy intersection, and continues along a tree-lined sidewalk with towering skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with street vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past colorful vending machines, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: player character walking ahead on the sidewalk
futuristic car driving past on the street

entered.detail: red and green automated food vending machine with 'BURRITOS' signage
green automated vending machine adjacent to the burrito machine
tall modern glass and steel tower with blue accents dominating the skyline
tall palm tree lining the street median
multi-lane city street with red curbs and vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk lined with automated food vending machines on the left. The camera follows a character walking ahead along the concrete path, with a multi-lane street and passing vehicles on the right. Towering glass skyscrapers rise in the distance under an overcast sky, establishing the cyberpunk urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential alley with mixed dirt and concrete

events.description: turns left around the corner of a brown building, leaving the vending machine area behind

agents.ego_description: navigating around the corner of a brown residential building and continuing along a narrower path

notable_agents.action: player character continuing to walk ahead along the path

entered.detail: single-story brown wooden house with white trim and covered porch
set of concrete stairs leading up to the building entrance
large green industrial dumpster beside the building
tall orange advertising billboard structure behind the building
areas of dry dirt and overgrown weeds between concrete sections

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around a corner, transitioning from the commercial vending area to a more residential zone featuring a brown wooden house with stairs and a green dumpster. The ground shows patches of dirt and weeds, and the futuristic skyline remains visible in the distance to the right.

events.description: approaching crosswalk and waiting for traffic to clear before crossing
crossing the street at the zebra crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for vehicles to pass, then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-story gray concrete office building with grid-patterned windows
white striped pedestrian crossing marking the asphalt
two-story green painted building with white roof trim
traffic signal pole with multiple lights and signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a large gray office building on the left. The character approaches the crosswalk, waits for traffic, then crosses the street alongside other pedestrians. Vehicles wait at the intersection, and a distinctive green building stands on the right corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk with industrial overpass in distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk away from the intersection, moving toward an industrial overpass structure

entered.detail: row of deciduous trees lining the sidewalk providing partial shade
multi-story residential building with balconies and external air conditioning units
large elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a quieter sidewalk lined with trees and residential apartment buildings. The environment feels more residential and less commercial, with an imposing industrial elevated highway structure visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city that transitions from a commercial vending district to a quieter residential neighborhood. It begins on a concrete sidewalk lined with automated food machines, following a character as they walk past a multi-lane street toward towering glass skyscrapers under an overcast sky. As the character turns a corner, the scene shifts from the commercial strip to a residential zone featuring a brown wooden house and patches of weeds before opening into a wide urban intersection. The camera then tracks the character crossing the street past a large gray office building and a distinctive green structure, moving through a crowd of pedestrians and waiting vehicles. Finally, the environment settles into a calmer residential area lined with trees and apartment buildings, leading the gaze toward an imposing industrial elevated highway in the distance.
